headline: ARCB Gains From AI, Pricing Discipline and a Tighter Truckload Cycle
summary: ARCB gains from tighter truckload capacity, disciplined pricing and AI-led savings, but inflation and mix pressures keep execution in focus.

headline: ArcBest's Outlook Hinges on Pricing, Productivity and Mix
summary: ARCB's outlook rests on firmer pricing, AI-led productivity savings and Asset-Light stabilization as freight risks still need close watching.

headline: Old Dominion Freight Line to Webcast Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call
summary: THOMASVILLE, N.C., July 01, 2026--Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (Nasdaq: ODFL) announced today that it plans to release its second quarter 2026 financial results before opening of trading on Wednesday, July 29, 2026. The Company will also hold a conference call to discuss its financial results and outlook at 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on Wednesday, July 29, 2026.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Upgrades Old Dominion Freight Line to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $237
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Jonathan Chappell   upgrades Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) from In-Line to Outperform and raises the price target from $219 to $237.
